---
title: "Papers, 2025"
bibliography: refs.bib
---

### [Dependency Parsing Evaluation for Low-resource Spontaneous Speech](https://aclanthology.org/2021.adaptnlp-1.16/) [@liu-prudhommeaux-2021-dependency]

- CHILDES
- Converted to UD (conversion is weird)

### [Alignment of Speech to Highly Imperfect Text Transcriptions](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/4284627) [@haubold2007alignment]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/cs/0612139)
- phoneme-based alignment
- vowel phonemes detected using a Matlab toolkit for formant estimation
- formants matched to expected values using Euclidean distance
- fricatives detected using spectral energy distribution
- phoneme sequences aligned using dynamic programming edit-distance
- uses [this toolkit](https://www.clear.rice.edu/elec431/projects96/digitalbb/)

### [On The Landscape of Spoken Language Models: A Comprehensive Survey](https://openreview.net/forum?id=BvxaP3sVbA) [@arora2025on]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08528)

### [Omnilingual ASR: Open-Source Multilingual Speech Recognition for 1600+ Languages](https://ai.meta.com/blog/omnilingual-asr-advancing-automatic-speech-recognition/) [@omnilingualasr2025]
- [dataset](https://huggingface.co/datasets/facebook/omnilingual-asr-corpus) --- CC-BY
- [code](https://github.com/facebookresearch/omnilingual-asr) --- code & models Apache 2.0
- [space](https://huggingface.co/spaces/facebook/omniasr-transcriptions)

### [Phoneme Boundary Detection Using Learnable Segmental Features](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9053053) [@kreuk2020phoneme]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2002.04992)
- [code](https://github.com/felixkreuk/SegFeat)

### [Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Phoneme Segmentation](https://www.isca-archive.org/interspeech_2020/kreuk20_interspeech.html) [@kreuk20_interspeech]

- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2007.13465)
- [code](https://github.com/felixkreuk/UnsupSeg)

### [Bridging the gap: A comparative exploration of Speech-LLM and end-to-end architecture for multilingual conversational ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.01461)
- [code](https://github.com/YuCeong-May/MLC-SLM)
- [models](https://huggingface.co/YuCeong-May/MLC-SLM)

### [Phonological level wav2vec2-based Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis method](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0167639325000640) [@shahin2025phonological]

- Separable CTC with Shared Blank (SCTC-SB)
- Outputs phonological features
- See also: [@shahin24_interspeech], [@han25_slate]
- [Code?](https://github.com/mostafashahin/MCTC-Speech-Attribute)
- Mostafa Shahin: [huggingface](https://huggingface.co/mostafaashahin), [github](https://github.com/mostafashahin)

### [Pronunciation modeling for large vocabulary conversational speech recognition](https://www.isca-archive.org/icslp_1998/ma98_icslp.html) [@ma98_icslp]

> As was found by other researchers, over-generating multiple pronunciations in the dictionary increases word confusability during recognition, often nullifying the advantages of modeling pronunciation variability.

- rules + decision trees
- rules based on [@finke97_eurospeech] and [@ostendorf1996modeling]
